sourcesContent:
import React from 'react' import '../Pages/navbar.css' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux' import { clear_all_selected, logoutUser, persistor } from '../components/redux'; export default function Dropdwon() { const navigate=useNavigate() const dispatch=useDispatch() const userData=useSelector((state)=>state.var.logged)[0] const name=userData.first_name+' '+userData.sur_name const Logout=()=>{ dispatch(logoutUser()) dispatch(clear_all_selected()) persistor.purge() navigate('/') } return ( <>

{name}

{userData.email}
{userData.phone}
Profile
Purchase History
Update Password
Logout
) }
